description: A distribution channel or platform for media content, such as social media sites, video platforms, or streaming services

name.description: Name of the platform, e.g. 抖音, 公众号, B站, YouTube

platform_type.description: Category of the platform: social (social network), video (video sharing), live (live streaming), audio (podcast/music), text (blog/article)

region.description: Primary geographic region or language market the platform serves, e.g. China, Global

user_base_size.description: Estimated size of the platform's user base, e.g. 1B+ MAU, 100M+ DAU

url.description: Official website URL of the platform
